name: SocialGest
description:
SocialGest isn’t joking around. Known for its efficiency in managing social media workflows, it offers a suite of tools designed for scheduling, analytics, and team collaboration. All said, it’s a great choice for businesses and agencies looking to optimize their social media operations.

Here’s the 411:

  • Pricing starts at $12/month
  • Smart scheduling features help you plan and publish content across multiple platforms
  • Collaboration is the name of the game. Facilitate smooth workflows among team members, and cut hours out of your workflow
  • Real-time analytics empower you to monitor everything as it happens. No worries about lags!
  • Post to Facebook, Instagram, X, LinkedIn, and YouTube

Key Features:

✅ Automated scheduling

✅ Collaborative tools

✅ Detailed reporting
what_people_say:
What people say :

SocialGest is no joke. With a user-friendly interface and the ability to streamline social media tasks, customers love it for its ease of use and ability to align teams of all sizes.

Here’s what they have to say:

“SocialGest has changed our social media management for the better. It’s easy to manage clients! I’d love if there were more white labeled features, though.”

“It’s great for scheduling and team collaboration, but I’d like more customization options for reports.”
cta_heading: Synup Social excels with superior features and competitive price
what_it_s_lacking:
What it’s lacking:

  • 🚫 More advanced analytics tools
  • 🚫 Customization in reporting
  • 🚫 Content creation assistance
